name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: At 606 E Memorial Blvd in Lakeland, FL 33801, Value Pawn & Jewelry can be reached at +1 863-603-0846.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, FL is a storefront location operating under the EZPAWN family of stores. EZPAWN is a national pawn chain, and this Miami location carries the Value Pawn & Jewelry branding while sharing EZPAWN's infrastructure, including its EZ+ Rewards loyalty program, online shop, and Instant Quote tool. The store serves the North Miami area and bills itself as a community-oriented provider of fast cash access and affordable pre-owned goods.

The store offers a range of financial and retail services centered on collateral-based lending. Customers can bring in electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, and other valuables to secure a short-term pawn loan. The store also purchases gold and diamond jewelry outright, including broken pieces of any karat or weight, with on-site testing. On the retail side, customers can shop thousands of pre-owned brand-name items at 25–70% off retail prices, with new inventory arriving daily. Additional services include layaway (10% down, monthly payments), a 'Take Today' deferred payment option through third-party financing partners, and an online shop for remote browsing. The location also offers firearms sales and auto loans as specialty categories.

What distinguishes this location within the pawn shop space is its integration with EZPAWN's digital ecosystem. The Instant Quote tool allows customers to get an estimated value for electronics online before visiting the store. The EZ+ Rewards program lets customers earn points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions, and manage accounts and payments online. The Jewelry VIP Program adds a layer of ongoing value for jewelry customers, offering guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up credit, free stone replacement, and free cleaning under one-year or lifetime enrollment tiers.

Value Pawn & Jewelry is a practical option for consumers who need immediate cash against personal property and have no other short-term credit access. However, pawn loans carry fees and terms that are not disclosed on the website — customers must visit in person to understand the true cost of borrowing. The 'Take Today' payment option depends on third-party credit eligibility and terms vary. As with all pawn lending, borrowers who do not redeem their items will forfeit them permanently. This is best treated as a last-resort cash option or a destination for bargain shopping, not a primary financial tool.
pros: Sunday hours available (12–5pm), unlike many competing pawn shops that close weekends
Online Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value before visiting the store
EZ+ Rewards program earns points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions with online account management
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payment schedule
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% off retail with daily new inventory arrivals
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning
Online shop enables remote browsing of available inventory before visiting in person
cons: Pawn loan fees and specific terms are not disclosed on the website — must visit in person
'Take Today' deferred payment option is subject to third-party credit approval with unspecified terms
Auto loan service is listed as a specialty but no details, rates, or eligibility criteria are provided
All merchandise is pre-owned with no new items available
Firearms sales on-site may be a concern for some customers in a financial services context
best_for: Consumers needing quick collateral-based cash with no credit check required
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools at deep discounts
Gold and jewelry sellers looking for on-site testing and same-day payment
Shoppers who want layaway or deferred payment options without traditional credit
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami-area consumers who need immediate cash against personal property without a credit check, or who want to shop quality pre-owned goods at significant discounts. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees, interest rates, and redemption terms — are not disclosed online, so borrowers must visit in person to understand the full cost of the loan before committing.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying (all karats, broken pieces accepted)
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (25–70% off retail)
Online shop with daily inventory updates
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation online
EZ+ Rewards loyalty program with points and online account management
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
Take Today flexible deferred payment via third-party financing
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loans, free cleaning, stone replacement)
Product Protection Plan for purchased merchandise
